0: A wide-angle shot of an aged traditional Chinese study-bedroom, with cracked plaster walls, tall wooden windows, hanging paper scrolls, an old wall map, dark wooden cabinets, and a simple bed covered with folded bedding. Soft daylight filters through the windows, illuminating a worn wooden writing desk with books, a desk lamp, and a wicker chair. The camera moves slowly forward toward the center of the room for the first second, creating a closer view of the desk area and the surrounding old furniture. The scene has a quiet, nostalgic atmosphere, with muted beige walls, warm wood tones, faded paper textures, and no modern objects.
16: A steady interior shot of the same old Chinese study-bedroom as the camera finishes its brief forward movement near the writing desk area. The view remains level and forward-facing for a short moment, keeping the bed, cabinets, desk, wicker chair, tall windows, cracked plaster walls, old map, and hanging paper scrolls within the same timeworn room. Soft natural light remains consistent, emphasizing the worn wood, dusty floor, aged wall texture, and quiet vintage atmosphere.
32: A steady interior shot of the same old Chinese study-bedroom after the camera has held a level view near the writing desk area. The camera now begins turning slowly to the right, gradually revealing the part of the room hidden from the starting frame: another weathered plaster wall, an old single wooden door, worn wooden trim, cracked corners, and the floor-wall junction around the doorway. The desk, books, lamp, wicker chair, cabinets, bed, hanging paper scrolls, and window light remain part of the surrounding space, while the newly revealed wall and door become the focus. The scene keeps its vintage, timeworn atmosphere and soft natural lighting.
